title: Pretty Piquant British Turkey Mince Afternoon Tea Sandwich
description: A satvik-friendly, nutty, and bouncy British dish featuring turkey mince, perfect for a weeknight afternoon tea, with a miso-marinate for added depth of flavor. This recipe is easy to make and serves as a delightful snack.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and carrot and cook until they are softened.
Add the turkey mince and cook until it is browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and a splash of water until smooth.
Add the miso paste mixture to the pan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Butter the white bread and cut it into small triangles or fingers.
Spoon the turkey mince mixture onto the bread and top with chopped walnuts.
